stream_response.body: {"error":"blocked","message":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected."}

notes: W5.4 regression: PRE-EXISTING baseline confirmed, NOT a W5.4 regression. Engine intercept FIRED — StreamGenerate (status 200) returned APF block JSON containing '차단' (민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다). Gemini FE silently swallowed the {"error":"blocked"} JSON: no warning bubble rendered (hasBlock=false, convoCount=0, body just echoes prompt). Matches documented baseline #1271/#1314/#1335 (WARNING_NOT_RENDERED — Gemini FE cannot parse engine block JSON shape). W5.4 binary (boq build 20260511) intercepts identically to W5.2/W5.3 baseline; the non-render is a FE-parse limitation independent of the W5.4 character_add_turn DB migration. Submit via trusted CDP click after fresh Page.navigate (promo modal absent this session). Logged-in session.
